Practice_text:
Get your finger ready here. 
Then watch the screen. 
You will see a circle appear. 
Press the red button if it is red. 
Press the blue button if it is blue. 
Always use your pointer finger and then bring it back here. 
Let's practice!

Press SPACE to continue
Task_text:
Now we are done practicing. We will do some more! 
They will keep coming quickly. 
Push the red or blue button as fast as you can!

Press SPACE to continue or R to repeat practice
Exit_text:
Great job! Goodbye!

Press SPACE to exit
